## Security Considerations

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes, if Rust code changed
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes, if Rust code changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials are logged or exposed
- [ ] Remote-execution behavior is covered by policy/security review, if applicable
